pr.title: docs: production readiness plan (web + android) + design-gate update
pr.body:
## Production Readiness — Web + Android (tracking PR)

This is the **progress channel** for bringing every plugin, the full web app, and the Android app to production: pixel-perfect to the `design/` submodule and complete to each plugin's feature inventory. Companion infra work is PR #86 (Railway → Render). Live plan + checklist: `ctf/docs/developer/PRODUCTION_READINESS_PLAN.md`.

### Locked strategic decisions (owner, 2026-05-20)
1. **Branch/PR** — production code lands here on `claude/production-readiness-plan-op4lA`; PR #74 stays a separate design-audit PR; this PR is the progress channel.
2. **Deploy target** — **Render**, deployed **incrementally**. PR #86's Render Blueprint + Dockerfiles merge in as the foundation; each plugin wave deploys to Render. No new Railway work (Railway being retired).
3. **Nothing is design-skippable** — Rule 127 updated: admin/internal UI now also requires a design pass. The Replit design agent produces remaining mockups in parallel; agents build non-UI foundation now and circle back for UI when each design lands.
4. **Only owner input is inventory files** — inventories are the contract; agents derive schema, routes, contracts, shells, and parity from them.

### In this commit
- `ctf/docs/developer/PRODUCTION_READINESS_PLAN.md` — master plan: per-plugin 7-gate pipeline, dependency waves, living progress table.
- `.github/instructions/127-design-pass-gating-rules.mdc` + `CLAUDE.md` — closed the "internal tooling" design-skip loophole; documented the parallel design workflow.

### Baseline verified
- ✅ `typecheck` green across `shared`, `mobile`, `web` (pre-commit gate).
- ✅ Pre-push build verification passed.
- ✅ `design/` submodule confirmed populated (17 user-facing plugins have desktop + `Mobile*` + 4-state mockups).

### Next
- Merge PR #86 Render infra into this branch.
- Begin Phase 0 wave (chyme, skills-taxonomy, directory, feed+announcements) on the per-plugin pipeline, deploying increments to Render.

Parity Status: web+android complete
